# from_container { #xileh.core.pipelinedata.from_container }

```python
core.pipelinedata.from_container(cpath)
```

Load a container located at cpath

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                | Description           | Default    |
|--------|---------------------|-----------------------|------------|
| cpath  | str or pathlib.Path | path to the container | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                |
|--------|--------|--------------------------------------------|
| pdata  | xData  | a pipelinedata container loaded from cpath |
